name: is_palindrome
cpp_unit: int is_palindrome(std::string s){ int n=(int)s.size(); for(int i=0;i<n/2;i++){ if(s[i]!=s[n-1-i]) return 0; } return 1; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%d
", is_palindrome("racecar")); printf("%d
", is_palindrome("hello")); printf("%d
", is_palindrome("abba")); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(is_palindrome("racecar"))
    print(is_palindrome("hello"))
    print(is_palindrome("abba"))

name: char_frequency
cpp_unit: int char_frequency(std::string s, char target){ int count=0; for(int i=0;i<(int)s.size();i++){ if(s[i]==target) count++; } return count; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ std::string s="banana"; printf("%d
", char_frequency(s,'a')); printf("%d
", char_frequency(s,'n')); printf("%d
", char_frequency(s,'b')); printf("%d
", char_frequency(s,'z')); return 0; }

name: to_upper_ascii
cpp_unit: std::string to_upper_ascii(std::string s){ std::string result=""; for(int i=0;i<(int)s.size();i++){ int c=(unsigned char)s[i]; if(c>=97 && c<=122) c-=32; result+=(char)c; } return result; }
cpp_driver: int main(){ printf("%s\n", to_upper_ascii("Hello, World").c_str()); printf("%s\n", to_upper_ascii("abcXYZ").c_str()); return 0; }

name: to_lower_ascii
cpp_unit: std::string to_lower_ascii(std::string s){ std::string result=""; for(int i=0;i<(int)s.size();i++){ int c=(unsigned char)s[i]; if(c>=65 && c<=90) c+=32; result+=(char)c; } return result; }
cpp_driver: int main(){ printf("%s\n", to_lower_ascii("Hello, World").c_str()); printf("%s\n", to_lower_ascii("ABCxyz").c_str()); return 0; }

name: count_chars
cpp_unit: int count_chars(std::string s){ return (int)s.size(); }
mojo_unit:
def count_chars(s: String) -> Int:
    return s.byte_length()
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%d
", count_chars("Hello")); printf("%d
", count_chars("")); printf("%d
", count_chars("a b c")); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(count_chars("Hello"))
    print(count_chars(""))
    print(count_chars("a b c"))

name: starts_with
cpp_unit: int starts_with(std::string s, std::string prefix){ int np=(int)prefix.size(); if(np>(int)s.size()) return 0; for(int i=0;i<np;i++){ if(s[i]!=prefix[i]) return 0; } return 1; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%d
", starts_with("hello world","hello")); printf("%d
", starts_with("hello","world")); printf("%d
", starts_with("ab","abc")); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(starts_with("hello world", "hello"))
    print(starts_with("hello", "world"))
    print(starts_with("ab", "abc"))

name: ends_with
cpp_unit: int ends_with(std::string s, std::string suffix){ int ns=(int)s.size(); int nf=(int)suffix.size(); if(nf>ns) return 0; for(int i=0;i<nf;i++){ if(s[ns-nf+i]!=suffix[i]) return 0; } return 1; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%d
", ends_with("hello world","world")); printf("%d
", ends_with("hello","lo")); printf("%d
", ends_with("hello","xo")); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(ends_with("hello world", "world"))
    print(ends_with("hello", "lo"))
    print(ends_with("hello", "xo"))

name: substring_count
cpp_unit: int substring_count(std::string s, std::string sub){ int ns=(int)s.size(); int nb=(int)sub.size(); if(nb==0) return 0; int count=0; for(int i=0;i+nb<=ns;i++){ int ok=1; for(int j=0;j<nb;j++){ if(s[i+j]!=sub[j]){ ok=0; break; } } if(ok) count++; } return count; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%d
", substring_count("abababab","ab")); printf("%d
", substring_count("aaaa","aa")); printf("%d
", substring_count("hello","xyz")); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(substring_count("abababab", "ab"))
    print(substring_count("aaaa", "aa"))
    print(substring_count("hello", "xyz"))

name: concat_n
cpp_unit: std::string concat_n(std::string s, int n){ std::string result=""; for(int i=0;i<n;i++) result+=s; return result; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%s
", concat_n("ab",3).c_str()); printf("%s
", concat_n("x",0).c_str()); printf("%s
", concat_n("-",5).c_str()); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(concat_n("ab", 3))
    print(concat_n("x", 0))
    print(concat_n("-", 5))

name: join_with_dash
cpp_unit: std::string join_with_dash(std::vector<std::string> parts){ std::string result=""; for(int i=0;i<(int)parts.size();i++){ if(i>0) result+="-"; result+=parts[i]; } return result; }
cpp_driver: int main(){ std::vector<std::string> p={"a","b","c"}; printf("%s\n", join_with_dash(p).c_str()); std::vector<std::string> q={"solo"}; printf("%s\n", join_with_dash(q).c_str()); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    var p: List[String] = ["a", "b", "c"]
    print(join_with_dash(p))
    var q: List[String] = ["solo"]
    print(join_with_dash(q))

name: run_length_encode
cpp_unit: std::string run_length_encode(std::string s){ int n=(int)s.size(); std::string result=""; int i=0; while(i<n){ char c=s[i]; int run=1; while(i+run<n && s[i+run]==c) run++; result+=c; result+=std::to_string(run); i+=run; } return result; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%s
", run_length_encode("aaabbc").c_str()); printf("%s
", run_length_encode("abc").c_str()); printf("%s
", run_length_encode("wwwww").c_str()); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(run_length_encode("aaabbc"))
    print(run_length_encode("abc"))
    print(run_length_encode("wwwww"))

name: count_words
cpp_unit: int count_words(std::string s){ int count=0; int in_word=0; for(int i=0;i<(int)s.size();i++){ if(s[i]==' '){ in_word=0; } else { if(!in_word) count++; in_word=1; } } return count; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%d
", count_words("hello world foo")); printf("%d
", count_words("  spaced  out  ")); printf("%d
", count_words("")); return 0; }
mojo_driver:
def main():
    print(count_words("hello world foo"))
    print(count_words("  spaced  out  "))
    print(count_words(""))

name: parse_int_checked
cpp_unit: long parse_int_checked(std::string s){ if(s.size()==0) throw std::runtime_error("empty"); long val=0; for(int i=0;i<(int)s.size();i++){ int c=(unsigned char)s[i]; if(c<48||c>57) throw std::runtime_error("non-digit"); val=val*10+(c-48); } return val; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%ld
", parse_int_checked("123")); printf("%ld
", parse_int_checked("7")); try { parse_int_checked("12a"); } catch(const std::runtime_error& e){ printf("bad
"); } try { parse_int_checked(""); } catch(const std::runtime_error& e){ printf("bad
"); } return 0; }

name: checked_mod
cpp_unit: long checked_mod(long a, long b){ if(b==0) throw std::runtime_error("mod by zero"); return a % b; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%ld
", checked_mod(17,5)); printf("%ld
", checked_mod(20,4)); try { checked_mod(3,0); } catch(const std::runtime_error& e){ printf("err
"); } return 0; }

name: bounds_checked_get
cpp_unit: int bounds_checked_get(std::vector<int> v, int idx){ if(idx<0 || idx>=(int)v.size()) throw std::out_of_range("index"); return v[idx]; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ std::vector<int> v={10,20,30}; printf("%d
", bounds_checked_get(v,0)); printf("%d
", bounds_checked_get(v,2)); try { bounds_checked_get(v,5); } catch(const std::out_of_range& e){ printf("oob
"); } try { bounds_checked_get(v,-1); } catch(const std::out_of_range& e){ printf("oob
"); } return 0; }

name: validate_range
cpp_unit: int validate_range(int x, int lo, int hi){ if(x<lo || x>hi) throw std::runtime_error("out of range"); return x; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%d
", validate_range(5,0,10)); printf("%d
", validate_range(0,0,10)); try { validate_range(11,0,10); } catch(const std::runtime_error& e){ printf("invalid
"); } try { validate_range(-1,0,10); } catch(const std::runtime_error& e){ printf("invalid
"); } return 0; }

name: checked_factorial
cpp_unit: long checked_factorial(int n){ if(n<0) throw std::runtime_error("negative"); if(n>20) throw std::runtime_error("overflow"); long r=1; for(int i=2;i<=n;i++) r*=i; return r; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%ld
", checked_factorial(5)); printf("%ld
", checked_factorial(0)); try { checked_factorial(-1); } catch(const std::runtime_error& e){ printf("err
"); } try { checked_factorial(25); } catch(const std::runtime_error& e){ printf("err
"); } return 0; }

name: checked_log2
cpp_unit: double checked_log2(double x){ if(x<=0.0) throw std::runtime_error("non-positive"); return std::log2(x); }

"); } try { checked_log2(-2.0); } catch(const std::runtime_error& e){ printf("err
"); } return 0; }

name: checked_index_str
cpp_unit: std::string checked_index_str(std::string s, int idx){ if(idx<0 || idx>=(int)s.size()) throw std::out_of_range("index"); return std::string(1, s[idx]); }

name: checked_avg
cpp_unit: double checked_avg(std::vector<int> v){ if(v.size()==0) throw std::runtime_error("empty"); long sum=0; for(int i=0;i<(int)v.size();i++) sum+=v[i]; return (double)sum/(double)v.size(); }
cpp_driver: int main(){ std::vector<int> v={2,4,6}; printf("%.17g\n", checked_avg(v)); std::vector<int> e={}; try { checked_avg(e); } catch(const std::runtime_error& ex){ printf("empty\n"); } return 0; }

name: checked_array_set
cpp_unit: int checked_array_set(std::vector<int>& v, int idx, int val){ if(idx<0 || idx>=(int)v.size()) throw std::out_of_range("index"); v[idx]=val; return v[idx]; }

name: checked_percent
cpp_unit: double checked_percent(double part, double whole){ if(whole==0.0) throw std::runtime_error("zero whole"); return part/whole*100.0; }
cpp_driver:
int main(){ printf("%.17g
", checked_percent(1.0,4.0)); printf("%.17g
", checked_percent(3.0,3.0)); try { checked_percent(1.0,0.0); } catch(const std::runtime_error& e){ printf("err
"); } return 0; }
